domain: Sherpa Himalayan rope-team load redistribution (10-20 loads per Everest expedition distributed across porters; equal-load policy avoids friction; redistributable on injury/fatigue; rope-team safety lines connect climbers across glacier; ahead-of-team Sherpas fix lines and carry forward redistributing as conditions change)
specific_mechanism: SHERPA-REDIST: orthogonal-subspace LoRA team with dynamic load redistribution + shared base safety-line + scout adapter. (1) M LoRA-adapters L_1...L_M each in mutually orthogonal subspaces (one per task/porter). (2) Dynamic load redistribution per-batch: gradient update budget reassigned across L_i based on capacity saturation; overloaded L_i sheds direction into under-loaded L_j via partial subspace transfer. (3) Shared low-rank base S_0 acts as 'safety rope' connecting all adapters — facilitates redistribution while preserving orthogonality across L_i. (4) Scout adapter L_scout pre-fixes the subspace direction before main team passes — pre-checks for instability. (5) Equal-load enforcement: per-step gradient norm balance constraint ||∇L_i|| ≈ avg across all i.
llm_application: SHERPA-REDIST: team-LoRA dynamic load redistribution + shared safety-line base + scout-adapter pre-fix + equal-load norm balance. Differs from O-LoRA EMNLP 2023 (orthogonal-subspace continual learning — no dynamic redistribution + scout). Shared LoRA Subspaces 2602.06043 (shared subspace continual fine-tuning — closest, no scout-adapter + dynamic redistribution). Compress then Serve 2407.00066 (joint compress LoRAs into shared basis — covers shared base but no team load redistribution). Distributed LoRA 2511.22880 (rebalance adapters across GPUs — closest, but at serving infrastructure level not training). Differs from R414 KAREN-WEFT-NULL (weft-warp twin), R427 ULI-EPHEMERAL (half-life decay), R441 BOGOLAN-FERMENT-NEG (sign-negative projection), R453 SLACK-TENSION-NULL (adaptive σ-tube) by EXPLICIT TEAM-LoRA DYNAMIC GRADIENT REDISTRIBUTION + SHARED SAFETY-LINE BASE + SCOUT ADAPTER PRE-FIX.
novelty_claim: O-LoRA + Shared LoRA + Compress-then-Serve + Distributed LoRA cover orthogonal-subspace LoRA team paradigm. SHERPA-REDIST adds (a) dynamic per-batch gradient redistribution across team + (b) shared safety-line base + (c) scout-adapter pre-fix + (d) equal-load gradient norm enforcement. Recombination — orthogonal LoRA + load balancing are mainstream.
content_words: orthogonal LoRA team dynamic load redistribution
equal-load gradient norm balance across adapters

llm_side: orthogonal LoRA team dynamic load redistribution
equal-load gradient norm balance across adapters
